summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Smart Matchmaking UI component on Video Analysis page (/analysis/v-seed-1). All features working correctly - toggle tabs, loading animation, coach/player cards, horizontal scroll, toast notifications, and premium locked cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: VideoAnalysisPage.js has unused 'motion' import and 'store' variable (eslint warnings)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data from fixtures.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Matchmaking component fully tested. All 24 data-testid attributes verified. Key test IDs: smart-matchmaking-section, matchmaking-tabs, tab-find-coach, tab-find-player, matchmaking-loading, matchmaking-scroll-container, coach-match-card-mc-{1-6}, player-match-card-mp-{1-6}, book-coach-mc-{1-3}, challenge-player-mp-{1-3}, matchmaking-view-all. Toast notifications use react-hot-toast.

features_tested.toggle_tabs_work: PASS - Find a Coach and Find a Player tabs switch content correctly
features_tested.loading_spinner_with_rotating_text: PASS - Loading animation appears for ~2.5s with rotating text messages
features_tested.coach_cards_unlocked: PASS - 3 unlocked cards (mc-1, mc-2, mc-3) showing name, rating, price, tags, match%, Book Now button
features_tested.coach_cards_locked: PASS - 3 locked cards (mc-4, mc-5, mc-6) with blur overlay and Go Premium text
features_tested.player_cards_unlocked: PASS - 3 unlocked cards (mp-1, mp-2, mp-3) showing name, AI match score, stat comparison, play style, Challenge button
features_tested.player_cards_locked: PASS - 3 locked cards (mp-4, mp-5, mp-6) with blur overlay and Go Premium text
features_tested.book_now_toast: PASS - Toast notification 'Booking request sent to {coach name}!' appears
features_tested.challenge_to_match_toast: PASS - Toast notification 'Challenge sent to {player name}!' appears
features_tested.horizontal_scroll: PASS - Scroll container works, scrollLeft changes on scroll
features_tested.data_testid_attributes: PASS - All 24 expected data-testid attributes present
